subject: fix(ui): address review findings in pagination and CSS
body:
- useShowMore: Replace setState-in-useMemo anti-pattern with useEffect;
  add items.length to reset deps so pagination resets on filter changes
- Timeline: Add missing filteredCommits dependency in commitListContent
  useMemo (executive/management view used it without declaring it)
- CSS: Add print media rules for show-more-btn, hamburger-menu,
  quick-guide overlay/modal so they don't appear in PDF exports
- CSS: Align quick-guide z-index (200→998, 201→999) with other modals
  (DetailPane, SettingsPane) to prevent layering conflicts

Tags: bugfix, review, ui
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: mobile-ux
Semver: patch
